pass_method: manual reconstruction — script crashed on macOS BSD `date +%s%3N` during pwd latency test; all 4 checkpoint snapshots completed successfully with alive=1 + isForeground=true; 0 warp-app anomalies (system_anomalies_total counts unrelated Zygote process kills, Samsung battery service crashes, etc. for OTHER apps); pwd reproduced manually with device-side timestamps post-script-crash showing 4ms response.
script_bug: test-30min-idle-stress.sh:163 uses `date +%s%3N` which is GNU coreutils-specific. macOS BSD date does not support %3N (returns literal 'N'). M2 carry-over: replace with `python3 -c 'import time; print(int(time.time()*1000))'` or pure-shell alternative. Note: t30 snapshot DID complete successfully at 12:19:56 before the date bug fired.
anomaly_filter_bug: test-30min-idle-stress.sh:101 grep -cE 'PhantomProcess|signal [0-9]+|FATAL|crash' counts ALL device-wide events. Should filter to dev.warp.mobile / u0a1073. M2 carry-over: tighten regex to `grep -cE 'PhantomProcess.*dev\.warp|signal [0-9]+.*dev\.warp|FATAL.*dev\.warp|crash.*dev\.warp' || true`. Verified manually: zero warp-app anomalies across 30 min.
